positive: A highly detailed, geometric mandala pattern featuring intertwining celestial elements like crescent moons, stylized constellations, and symmetrical floral motifs, rendered in intricate black line art on a pale, aged parchment background. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, utilizing strong, elegant silhouettes and negative space for maximum contrast. Style should mimic a sophisticated woodcut etching or copperplate engraving, with clean, crisp lines and zero bleeding. Use a limited palette of deep indigo and charcoal black against an off-white background. Highly detailed, sacred geometry, Zentangle style, minimalist, vector art quality.
